name: vmvc
head: 488c7925a8e24f4db466abccb52a11b74c5b4bb6
author: Kobi Lurie
description: a framework for handling complexity by having a "middle-man" focal point to handle user interactions - a variant of the mvc/dci concept

releases.d: a skeleton/structure for a variation on the mvc pattern, similar to dci. For command line and gui programs. it's a middle ground between rapid application development and handling software complexity.
